_publications._publicationTitle: A transcriptomic, proteomic, and functional genetic atlas dissects neurofibromin function in the peripheral nervous system.

_contextSnippet: Immunoblotting revealed sgNF1 repression was sufficient to increase pERK and H/N/K Ras GTP levels
details: Successfully detected increased pERK levels in CRISPRi sgNF1 iPN cells and demonstrated dose-response effects with selumetinib treatment
